calendar.matters:
Petition To Establish Special Needs Trust
Off Calendar Mar-12-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Charles Maguire appeared for Attorney David Brown on behalf of Wendy Yurgo. Bliss Rodriguez also present.

Mr. Rodriguez stated that he agreed to not requiring Court accountings, to not having Court authorization for payment of fees, to not requiring a bond and to having the current Trustee designate a Successor Trustee. The Court granted the petition (subject to review of the written order).

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy V. Jung.
